input.event_description: Patient was undergoing cardiac monitoring. Device alarm did not activate during ventricular fibrillation event. Patient expired at the bedside before resuscitation could be initiated.

expected_output.severity_rationale: Narrative explicitly states 'Patient expired at the bedside'; MAUDE event_type=death corroborates

notes: Hard-rule death call: explicit narrative evidence + MAUDE corroboration. High confidence.

input.event_description: Triage AI software failed to flag CT scan as positive for large vessel occlusion. Patient presented with acute stroke symptoms and was hospitalized for 8 days. Required mechanical thrombectomy with moderate residual neurological deficit at discharge.
input.mfr_narrative: Algorithm review confirms LVO at periphery of detection map per labeling.
input.patient_outcome_extracted: Delayed thrombectomy by 42 min; moderate residual neurological deficit

expected_output.severity_rationale: Narrative reports 8-day hospitalization, mechanical thrombectomy intervention, and moderate residual neurological deficit — meets 21 CFR 803.3(w) serious injury criteria

notes: Multiple independent qualifiers for serious_injury (hospitalization, intervention, permanent impairment).

input.event_description: Alarm activated during procedure. Staff silenced alarm after verifying no physiological event. Procedure completed uneventfully.
input.mfr_narrative: Sensor calibration drift suspected; device returned for analysis.

expected_output.severity_rationale: Narrative describes alarm activation with verified absence of physiological event; procedure completed uneventfully — device-side failure with no patient harm

notes: Classic device-only failure; narrative and MAUDE both support malfunction.

input.event_description: User reported frustration with software interface during routine read. No patient was being scanned at the time. No physiological event occurred.

expected_output.severity_rationale: Narrative explicitly states no patient involvement and no physiological event; this is a user-experience complaint, not an injury — disagrees with MAUDE event_type=injury
evidence_quotes_contains_any: No patient was being scanned at the time

notes: MAUDE event_type=injury is contradicted by narrative. Triage downgrades to 'other' but flags for human review per §6 procedure step 8.

expected_output.severity_rationale: Narrative contains only equipment-return log; no event description and MAUDE event_type is empty — cannot determine severity

notes: Pure equipment-return logs cannot be triaged. Honest 'insufficient_information' beats a guess.
